description_long: This warehouse features a distinctive L-shaped layout with two main volumes, each topped with a reddish-brown gabled roof made of corrugated material. The exterior walls are dark gray, likely concrete or masonry, and are punctuated by a series of large, blue-tinted windows along the longer wing, providing ample natural light. One section of the building has a flat, green-topped roof, possibly serving as a rooftop garden or utility area. The structure is robust and utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. The windows are arranged in a grid pattern, and there are no visible doors or signage on the facades. The overall design suggests a modern industrial warehouse suited for storage and logistics operations.
description: A modern L-shaped warehouse with dark gray walls, reddish-brown gabled roofs, and large blue-tinted windows. One section features a flat green rooftop area, adding a functional or aesthetic element.
description_view_0: The L-shaped layout is prominent, showing both the gabled and flat green-topped roof sections, with large blue windows visible on the connecting facade.
description_view_1: The gabled roof dominates the view, with the green flat roof section clearly visible at the rear, and minimal window detail on the side.
description_view_2: The flat green rooftop and grid of blue-tinted windows are most visible, with the gabled roof peeking behind the main volume.
description_view_3: The flat green roof and the long reddish-brown gabled roof are seen side by side, with a single row of blue windows along the facade.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade features a grid of large blue-tinted windows set in dark gray concrete or masonry walls, with minimal ornamentation and a strong emphasis on functional, industrial aesthetics. The entryway is not visible, and the facade is defined by its clean lines and repetitive window pattern.
attribute_roof_structure: The building has two distinct roof types: a large gabled roof made of reddish-brown corrugated material and a flat roof section covered with green vegetation or turf. No skylights, HVAC units, or other rooftop equipment are visible.
